use_cases: Inline username or display name editing in user profile settings
Quick inline text editing for labels or titles in dashboard interfaces
Toggle-based content editing for settings panels and admin forms
Editable field replacement for static text display components
Compact text input with visual state indication for SaaS applications
ai_summary: An inline editable text input component that toggles between view and edit modes with animated transitions. Features a pill-shaped design with smooth spring animations on the edit icon, border and ring effects when editing, and manages internal state for the edit toggle. Designed for user-friendly inline content editing in profile settings, dashboards, and settings panels.
